has the quality of these five elements.
The five tattvas repeat after every ninety minutes, on any
day these sixteen such repetitions. The duration of each
tattvas is fixed. Their sequence depends on the weekdays. We
give the tattvas, their duration, the ruler of each, and which
tattva begins as a given day in the week.

Nadi Rectification 69
Tattvas First one on the day' Ruler Duration Sex
Tejas Sunday Sun 18 minutes Male
Jala Monday Moon 12 minutes Female
Tejas Tuesday Mars 18 minutes Male
Prithvi Wednesday Mercury 6 minutes Male
Akash Thursday Jupiter 30 minutes Male
Jala Friday Venus 12 minutes Female
Vayu Saturday Saturn 24 minutes Female
The order of sequence which the Tattvas follow is Prithivi
(Earth) Jala (water), Tejas (light, heat, fire), Vayu (air, wind),
and Akash (space, ether). Their duration in thb sequence is 6,
12, 18, 24 and 30 minutes. Jala (water) and Vayu (air, wind)
are faminine. The others are masculine. This is a slight modi
